<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE mapper PUBLIC "-//mybatis.org//DTD Mapper 3.0//EN"
        "http://mybatis.org/dtd/mybatis-3-mapper.dtd">
<mapper namespace="com.supermarket.mapper.SalesOrderMapper">

    <resultMap id="BaseResultMap" type="com.supermarket.entity.SalesOrder">
        <id column="order_id" property="orderId"/>
        <result column="order_no" property="orderNo"/>
        <result column="user_id" property="userId"/>
        <result column="total_amount" property="totalAmount"/>
        <result column="discount_amount" property="discountAmount"/>
        <result column="paid_amount" property="paidAmount"/>
        <result column="change_amount" property="changeAmount"/>
        <result column="payment_method" property="paymentMethod"/>
        <result column="order_status" property="orderStatus"/>
        <result column="remark" property="remark"/>
        <result column="create_time" property="createTime"/>
        <result column="real_name" property="realName"/>
        <result column="detail_count" property="detailCount"/>
    </resultMap>

    <!-- 创建订单 -->
    <insert id="insert" useGeneratedKeys="true" keyProperty="orderId" parameterType="com.supermarket.entity.SalesOrder">
        INSERT INTO sales_order(order_no, user_id, total_amount, discount_amount,
                               paid_amount, change_amount, payment_method, remark)
        VALUES(#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{totalAmount}, #{discountAmount},
              #{paidAmount}, #{changeAmount}, #{paymentMethod}, #{remark})
    </insert>

    <!--
      分页查询订单（核心多表关联SQL）
      - LEFT JOIN sys_user：获取收银员姓名（real_name）
      - 子查询：统计当前订单包含的商品种类数（detail_count）
      - 动态 SQL：<if> 标签实现按订单号模糊搜索
    -->
    <select id="selectPage" resultMap="BaseResultMap">
        SELECT o.*, u.real_name,
               (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sales_detail WHERE order_id = o.order_id) AS detail_count
        FROM sales_order o
        LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON o.user_id = u.user_id
        <where>
            <if test="keyword != null and keyword != ''">
                AND o.order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
            </if>
        </where>
        ORDER BY o.order_id DESC
        LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
    </select>

    <select id="count" resultType="int">
        SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sales_order
        <where>
            <if test="keyword != null and keyword != ''">
                AND order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
            </if>
        </where>
    </select>

    <!--
      今日销售汇总
      - DATE(create_time)=CURDATE()：只统计当天数据
      - COALESCE：避免无数据时返回 NULL
      - order_status=1：只统计已完成的订单
    -->
    <select id="selectTodaySummary" resultType="map">
        SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(*), 0)         AS todayOrderCount,
               COALESCE(SUM(paid_amount), 0) AS todaySalesAmount
        FROM sales_order
        WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()
          AND order_status = 1
    </select>

    <select id="selectById" resultMap="BaseResultMap">
        SELECT o.*, u.real_name
        FROM sales_order o
        LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON o.user_id = u.user_id
        WHERE o.order_id = #{orderId}
    </select>

    <!--
      查询视图 v_sales_summary（销售日报）
      视图定义：按天(daily)聚合 order_count、total_sales、total_quantity
      用于首页展示销售趋势
    -->
    <select id="selectSalesReport" resultType="map">
        SELECT * FROM v_sales_summary LIMIT 30
    </select>

    <!-- 退款：更新订单状态 -->
    <update id="updateOrderStatus">
        UPDATE sales_order SET order_status = #{orderStatus} WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
    </update>

</mapper>
